__inputs.name: DS_POSTGRES
__inputs.label: Awa Postgres
__inputs.description: Postgres datasource pointing at the awa database

list.name: awa_ui_url
list.label: awa-ui base URL
list.description: Base URL of the awa-ui admin site. Queue/kind panel cells link here for drill-down (awa-ui is richer for transactional admin than this dashboard).

panels.title: Total Backlog
panels.description: Jobs not yet finished: available + retryable + running. Click to drill into the queue breakdown on awa-ui.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(sum(available + retryable + running), 0)::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_state_counts

panels.title: Completions / minute
panels.description: Jobs completed in the last minute, across all queues. Steady-state floor for capacity planning.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.jobs_hot WHERE state = 'completed' AND finalized_at > now() - interval '1 minute'

panels.title: Failed (last hour)
panels.description: Jobs finalised as 'failed' in the last hour — jumps on a sustained problem.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.jobs_hot WHERE state = 'failed' AND finalized_at > now() - interval '1 hour'

panels.title: Paused queues
panels.description: Queues an operator has paused. Non-zero means producer traffic is still piling up somewhere.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_meta WHERE paused = true

panels.title: Stale / drifted descriptors
panels.description: Count of queue + kind descriptors currently flagged as stale (no live runtime refreshing) or drifted (live runtimes reporting different hashes). Non-zero for long periods suggests a rollout is stuck or a retired queue needs its row deleted.

targets.rawSql: WITH live AS (SELECT * FROM awa.runtime_instances WHERE last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((GREATEST(snapshot_interval_ms, 1000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) >= now()), qv AS (SELECT d.key AS q, count(DISTINCT d.value) n FROM live r CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(r.queue_descriptor_hashes) AS d(key, value) GROUP BY d.key), kv AS (SELECT d.key AS k, count(DISTINCT d.value) n FROM live r CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(r.job_kind_descriptor_hashes) AS d(key, value) GROUP BY d.key) SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM awa.queue_descriptors qd LEFT JOIN qv ON qv.q = qd.queue WHERE qd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(qd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() OR COALESCE(qv.n, 0) > 1) + (SELECT count(*) FROM awa.job_kind_descriptors kd LEFT JOIN kv ON kv.k = kd.kind WHERE kd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(kd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() OR COALESCE(kv.n, 0) > 1) AS value

panels.title: Queue Depth by State
panels.description: Current jobs by queue, stacked by state. Queue column carries the declared display name when available. Click a data point → drill into awa-ui for that queue.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(now()) AS time, (COALESCE(qd.display_name, qs.queue) || ' · ' || s.state) AS metric, s.value::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_state_counts qs LEFT JOIN awa.queue_descriptors qd ON qd.queue = qs.queue CROSS JOIN LATERAL (VALUES ('available', qs.available), ('running', qs.running), ('failed', qs.failed), ('retryable', qs.retryable), ('scheduled', qs.scheduled), ('waiting_external', qs.waiting_external)) s(state, value) WHERE s.value > 0 ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Queue Lag (oldest available job)
panels.description: Age of the oldest 'available' job per queue. The #1 alerting signal — jumps sharply when workers can't keep up.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(now()) AS time, COALESCE(qd.display_name, j.queue) AS metric, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - min(j.run_at)))::float8 AS value FROM awa.jobs_hot j LEFT JOIN awa.queue_descriptors qd ON qd.queue = j.queue WHERE j.state = 'available' GROUP BY j.queue, qd.display_name ORDER BY metric

panels.title: Throughput (completed vs failed, 1m rate)
panels.description: Per-queue completion and failure rate. A healthy system has completion ≫ failure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', finalized_at) AS time, (COALESCE(qd.display_name, j.queue) || ' · ' || j.state::text) AS metric, count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.jobs_hot j LEFT JOIN awa.queue_descriptors qd ON qd.queue = j.queue WHERE j.state IN ('completed', 'failed') AND finalized_at > now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Descriptor Health
panels.description: Only shown when non-empty — stale = no live runtime refreshing, drift = live runtimes disagreeing on descriptor hash. Click target → awa-ui for /queues/<queue> or /kinds.

targets.rawSql: WITH live AS (SELECT * FROM awa.runtime_instances WHERE last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((GREATEST(snapshot_interval_ms, 1000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) >= now()), qv AS (SELECT d.key AS q, count(DISTINCT d.value) n FROM live r CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(r.queue_descriptor_hashes) AS d(key, value) GROUP BY d.key), kv AS (SELECT d.key AS k, count(DISTINCT d.value) n FROM live r CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each_text(r.job_kind_descriptor_hashes) AS d(key, value) GROUP BY d.key) SELECT 'queue' AS target_type, qd.queue AS target, qd.owner, qd.last_seen_at, (CASE WHEN qd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(qd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() THEN 'stale' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN COALESCE(qv.n, 0) > 1 THEN CASE WHEN qd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(qd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() THEN '+drift' ELSE 'drift' END ELSE '' END) AS status FROM awa.queue_descriptors qd LEFT JOIN qv ON qv.q = qd.queue WHERE qd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(qd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() OR COALESCE(qv.n, 0) > 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'kind' AS target_type, kd.kind AS target, kd.owner, kd.last_seen_at, (CASE WHEN kd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(kd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() THEN 'stale' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN COALESCE(kv.n, 0) > 1 THEN CASE WHEN kd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(kd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() THEN '+drift' ELSE 'drift' END ELSE '' END) AS status FROM awa.job_kind_descriptors kd LEFT JOIN kv ON kv.k = kd.kind WHERE kd.last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((COALESCE(kd.sync_interval_ms, 10000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) < now() OR COALESCE(kv.n, 0) > 1 ORDER BY status DESC, target_type, target

panels.title: Catalog references · drill into awa-ui for the rich views
Declared queues
panels.description: Count of queues in awa.queue_descriptors. Click through to awa-ui's /queues page for the full table, with pause/resume/drain actions this dashboard intentionally doesn't duplicate.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.queue_descriptors
SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.job_kind_descriptors

panels.title: Live runtime instances
panels.description: Runtimes whose last_seen_at is within 3× their snapshot interval. Click through to awa-ui's /runtime page for per-instance detail.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.runtime_instances WHERE last_seen_at + make_interval(secs => GREATEST(((GREATEST(snapshot_interval_ms, 1000) / 1000) * 3)::int, 30)) >= now()
SELECT count(*)::bigint AS value FROM awa.cron_jobs
